title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Full-stack finance CRM (Next.js, Supabase) built from scratch with CTO and COO. MVP live in 5 months with real users.
highlights: Built CRM core: companies, deals pipeline (lead → won → onboarding), contacts with many-to-many linking, and saved views with custom filters and columns.
Developed offer composer with services, bundles, and pricing; contract templates with Criipto digital signing and full lifecycle tracking.
Designed work management: Kanban/list/calendar task views, recurring tasks, checklists, comments, attachments, and task-to-deal/company linking.
Built configurable workflow engine with templates, triggers, cadence scheduling, per-client overrides, and auto-assignment rules.
Delivered time tracking with Norwegian overtime/flex rules and admin approval flow.
Integrated Stripe subscriptions, affiliate referral system, Google/Microsoft SSO, MFA, KYC/KYB via Signicat, and BRREG lookup.
Built multi-tenant org system with RBAC, member management, dashboard analytics, and notifications via Resend and Infobip.
Developed CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and Slack deployment/PR notifications.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Contract)
summary: Built Working Capital module, AI forecasting layer, and multi-tenant financial modeling with Xero/QuickBooks integrations.
highlights: Built Working Capital module (AP/AR tracking, liquidity projections) and Scenario Builder for financial modeling.

Built AI forecasting commentary layer (OpenAI/DeepSeek via Agno) with usage-based billing.
Implemented BuddyWorks CI/CD with multi-stage Docker builds, Pytest gates, and zero-downtime AWS EC2 deployments.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Contract)
summary: Maintained production microservices on GKE and migrated Flask services to FastAPI with async refactoring.

title: Senior Software Engineer

title: Senior Software Engineer

Utilized Pydantic, pandas, numpy, Celery, Redis, and Docker across projects.
